reminderMessages: ✨ Ek glass paani bohot kaam aata hai.
🚰 Jal ka chhota sa break lijiye.
😊 Aapka future self aapko dhanyavaad dega.
💙 A small sip now, a healthier you later.
🥛 Your body is asking for water!
drinkWaterMessages: 😊 Stay hydrated! Next reminder in {minutes} minute{plural}.
💙 Keep shining! I'll return in {minutes} minute{plural}.
snoozeMessages: 🛌 Take a short break, but don't forget to drink water!
⏰ I'll remind you again soon, stay hydrated!
💤 A little snooze, but remember to drink water!
🕒 I'll be back in a bit, stay hydrated!
